title: haxtonia phlogopappa
intro: Haxtonia phlogopappa, also known as the red ochre plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Haxtonia phlogopappa include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to aid in healing and relaxation.
